title: IMMZD2DTTyphoidTy21a ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
description: JSON Schema for IMMZD2DTTyphoidTy21a ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: Client's age is less than 6 years-40
Client is not due for Typhoid vaccination-48
Client's age is more than or equal to 6 years-40
No live vaccine, other than typhoid, was administered in the past 4 weeks-132
Client is due for Typhoid vaccination-44
Live vaccine, other than typhoid, was administered in the past 4 weeks-132
The latest typhoid dose was administered less than 3 years ago-106
Client is not due for typhoid booster dose-48
The latest typhoid dose was administered more than 3 years ago-106
Client is due for typhoid booster dose-44

narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD2DTTyphoidTy21a ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD2DTTyphoidTy21aVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
